name: Marshmallow Pinwheels
recipeInstructions:
1. Use any flavor gelatin mix; the 4 serving size is called for in this recipe from Kraft.
2. Use 12 Jet-Puffed Kraft regular sized marshmallows.
3. Spray an 8 or 9-inch square pan with no-stick cooking spray (2-3 short sprays).
4. Spread on bottom and sides of pan with paper towels.
5. Mix gelatin and warm water in a 2 quart microwave bowl.
6. Microwave for 1 1/2 minutes on High; stir to dissolve completely.
7. Add marshmallows and microwave for 1 minute or until marshmallows are puffed and almost melted.
8. Stir mixture slowly until marshmallows are completely melted and mixture is smooth. A creamy layer will float to the top.
9. Pour into prepared pan and refrigerate 45 minutes or until set.
10. Loosen edges with a knife for easy rolling.
11. Starting at one edge, roll up tightly.
12. With seam-side down, cut into 1/2 inch slices.
13. Serve immediately or refrigerate. Makes 10-12 pieces.
Tips:
For easier cutting, use a sharp knife that has been dipped in warm water.
Recipe can be prepared in advance. If refrigerated more than 8 hours, let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before rolling.
